regional_cost_note: Carpet installation in Napier typically costs $25–$45 per m², with wool and premium carpets at the higher end. Free measure and quote is standard practice among local installers.

businesses.name: Plush Carpet Fitting
businesses.known_for: Specialists in all methods of carpet fitting including wool, nylon, sisal, axminster, Persian rugs and marine carpets; promotes NZ-made products and also works with secondhand materials.

businesses.name: Kiwi Flooring Services Ltd
businesses.known_for: Two decades of carpet and vinyl flooring installation for new builds and renovations across Hawke's Bay, including carpet tiles, commercial vinyl, and all repair and restretching work.

businesses.name: Gorillafloors Ltd
businesses.known_for: 28 years of experience in vinyl and carpet flooring for residential and commercial properties across Hawke's Bay, including full floor preparation work.
